prompts.name: Bright White Room
prompts.text: Use bright daylight in a white room with clean reflections, soft shadows, and airy high-key exposure.

prompts.name: Warm Lamp Bedroom
prompts.text: Use warm bedside or desk lamp light with cozy falloff, soft shadows, and intimate indoor mood.

prompts.name: Sunset Backlight
prompts.text: Use sunset backlighting with glowing hair edges, warm rim light, and controlled face visibility.

prompts.name: Dappled Forest Light
prompts.text: Use dappled forest light passing through leaves, creating natural highlights, soft shadows, and organic depth.

prompts.name: Neon Reflections
prompts.text: Use neon light reflecting on wet surfaces, glossy clothing, glass, or metal for stylish color depth.

prompts.name: Overcast Portrait
prompts.text: Use overcast daylight for soft flattering portrait lighting with minimal harsh shadows.

prompts.name: Gothic Candlelight
prompts.text: Use candlelight in a darker gothic space with warm highlights, deep but readable shadows, and atmospheric glow.

prompts.name: Blue Laboratory Light
prompts.text: Use cool blue laboratory lighting with clean highlights, glass reflections, and a precise technical mood.

prompts.name: Snow Diffuse Light
prompts.text: Use snow-reflected diffuse light with soft cool brightness and gentle winter clarity.

prompts.name: Stage Spotlights
prompts.text: Use stage spotlights with clear beams, performance focus, and balanced subject visibility.

prompts.name: Firelight Night
prompts.text: Use warm firelight at night with flickering orange highlights, soft falloff, and deep atmosphere.

prompts.name: Gray Rain Light
prompts.text: Use gray rainy daylight with muted color, diffused contrast, and reflective environmental softness.

prompts.name: Moonlit Fog
prompts.text: Use moonlight through fog with cool blue tones, soft silhouettes, and quiet mystery.

prompts.name: Golden Window Light
prompts.text: Use golden light through a window with warm beams, dust motes, and natural indoor glow.

prompts.name: Hologram Glow
prompts.text: Use hologram glow as a light source with cyan or violet accents, soft reflections, and futuristic atmosphere.
